Invoice PDF Validation Corpus

Contents:
- pdfs_searchable_text/: 200 PDF invoices with selectable/searchable text.
- pdfs_no_searchable_text/: 150 independent image-only PDF invoices with no searchable text.
- paired_searchable_and_no_text/: 50 image-only PDF invoices that visually match the first 50 searchable PDFs.
- truth_data/invoice_truth_data.jsonl: full truth data for every PDF.
- truth_data/invoice_truth_data.csv: flattened invoice-level truth data.
- truth_data/invoice_line_items.csv: line-item truth data.
- truth_data/paired_duplicate_map.csv and .json: maps the 50 matched searchable/no-text pairs.
- truth_data/qa_summary.json: extraction spot-checks and counts.
- manifest.txt: relative paths included in this corpus.

Validation note:
The no-searchable-text PDFs were generated by rasterizing the invoice page and wrapping the image into a PDF. Text extraction checks found 0 characters in the no-text PDF set. The searchable-text PDFs were generated directly with PDF text operators.

Date generated: 2026-04-30
